leagueName: Women's European World Cup Qualifiers - Group 3
reason: Portugal won 3-0 vs Latvia earlier this month, Latvia lost 0-3 to Portugal and 0-1 to Finland. Portugal dominant at home with Latvia having worst defense in group [web:5][web:10].
